summary: Training Intake Wizard Phases 1-3 Backend Testing completed. All 25 tests passed after fixing critical route registration bug. Routes defined after app.include_router() were not being registered.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Routes defined after app.include_router(api_router) at line 30323 were NOT being registered. Moved app.include_router() to after all routes are defined (line 31371).
FIXED: Duplicate route definition for /training/intake - removed duplicate at line 31193, kept early definition at line 7223 which now calls TrainingIntakeService
FIXED: Early /training/intake endpoint was returning placeholder message instead of calling TrainingIntakeService - now properly validates document and calls extraction service
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle Alonge). Created manual training records for fire_safety, infection_control, safeguarding during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Intake Wizard Phases 1-3 fully tested. Key endpoints verified: (1) GET /api/employees/{id}/training/proposed-items - returns proposed items array with total and pending_review counts, (2) GET /api/employees/{id}/training/requests - returns training request history, (3) POST /api/employees/{id}/training/request - creates email request via EmailRequestService, (4) POST /api/employees/{id}/training/intake - triggers multi-training extraction with document validation, (5) POST /api/employees/{id}/training/proposed-items/review - approves/rejects items and creates training_records, (6) POST /api/employees/{id}/training/manual - creates training record without certificate. TRAINING_CODE_MAPPING maps raw titles like 'CSTF - Fire Safety' to internal codes. Name comparison returns match/partial_match/mismatch/review_required. Approved items create canonical training_records that appear in Training Matrix.

get_proposed_items.details: Returns items array, total count, pending_review count. Supports status filter.

get_training_requests.details: Returns training request history from email_requests collection

post_training_request.details: Creates email request via EmailRequestService. Returns duplicate_blocked if request already exists.

post_training_intake.details: Validates document exists, calls TrainingIntakeService.extract_multi_training. Returns 404 for invalid document.

post_proposed_items_review.details: Approves/rejects items, creates training_records for approved items. Returns approved/rejected counts and errors.

post_manual_training.details: Creates training record without certificate. Updates existing record if same training_code exists.

training_mapping_layer.details: TRAINING_CODE_MAPPING maps raw titles to internal codes (fire_safety, infection_control, etc.)

authentication.details: All endpoints require authentication, return 401 without token

bugfix_verification.original_issue: Routes defined after app.include_router() were not being registered - /training/proposed-items/review returned 404, /training/manual returned 405
bugfix_verification.root_cause: app.include_router(api_router) was called at line 30323, but training intake routes were defined at lines 31269-31364 (after the include)
bugfix_verification.fix_applied: Moved app.include_router(api_router) to line 31371 (after all routes are defined). Removed duplicate /training/intake route. Updated early /training/intake to call TrainingIntakeService.
bugfix_verification.verification_method: All 25 backend tests pass. Manual curl tests confirm endpoints return expected responses.
